query:
SELECT 
  fr.code, fr.name, fr.unitWeight, fr.yieldPercentage,
  rc.quantity, rc.componentType,
  i.name as ingredient_name, i.unitType as ing_unit,
  fr2.name as recipe_name, fr2.code as recipe_code
FROM final_recipes fr
LEFT JOIN recipe_components rc ON fr.id = rc.recipeFinalId
LEFT JOIN ingredients i ON rc.componentId = i.id AND rc.componentType = 'INGREDIENT'
LEFT JOIN final_recipes fr2 ON rc.componentId = fr2.id AND rc.componentType = 'SEMI_FINISHED'
WHERE fr.code LIKE '%RIBS%'
ORDER BY fr.code, rc.quantity DESC;
